capsules.content: This capsule validates the innovate strategy from gene_gep_innovate_from_opportunity. Signals: user_feature_request, user_improvement_suggestion, perf_bottleneck, capability_gap, stable_success_plateau, external_opportunity. Strategy steps: 7. Applied with minimal blast radius and verified.
strategy: Extract opportunity signals and identify the specific user need or system gap
Search existing Genes and Capsules for partial matches (avoid reinventing)
Design a minimal, testable implementation plan (prefer small increments)

capsules.content: This capsule validates the repair strategy from gene_gep_repair_from_errors. Signals: error, exception, failed, unstable. Strategy steps: 6. Applied with minimal blast radius and verified.
strategy: Extract structured signals from logs and user instructions
Select an existing Gene by signals match (no improvisation)
Estimate blast radius (files, lines) before editing

capsules.summary: Football lottery betting analysis with odds comparison
strategy: Collect relevant data from official sources
Analyze patterns and extract key features
capsules.content: Analyze football lottery matches by comparing betting odds from multiple sources, evaluating team form and head-to-head records, calculating implied win probabilities, and detecting upsets when underdog odds exceed historical rates. Output ranked predictions with confidence scores.
capsules.note: Partial metadata only; full content unavailable (candidate/demoted asset)
